title: Build FizzBuzz CLI in Go

steps.description: Implement FizzBuzz domain logic to handle the computation of FizzBuzz based on an input range.
steps.done_condition: FizzBuzz logic is implemented and passing unit tests.

steps.description: Define ports/interfaces for FizzBuzz logic to allow invocation from use cases.
Implement the use case that orchestrates the FizzBuzz logic for external invocation.
steps.done_condition: Use case is implemented and passing unit tests.

steps.description: Develop the primary CLI adapter to handle user input and display FizzBuzz results.
steps.done_condition: CLI adapter is implemented and passes input/output tests.

successCriteria: CLI successfully computes and displays FizzBuzz results based on user input.
